response:
The function should take a list of musical notes and two vocal range boundaries as input. It should check if each note in the list falls within the specified range. The function will convert each note to its corresponding frequency and compare it against the lower and upper bounds. If all notes are within the range, the function returns `True`; otherwise, it returns `False`.
